target.post_title: Augie Studio Review: AI-Driven Video Production Analysis

current_public_metadata.document_title: Augie Studio Review: AI-Driven Video Production Analysis - Kris Krug | AI Keynote Speaker & Creative Technologist
current_public_metadata.og_title: Augie Studio Review: AI-Driven Video Production Analysis
current_public_metadata.og_description: Lights, camera, AI action! Buckle up as we dive into Augie Studio, the cutting-edge platform revolutionizing video production by putting the power of artificial intelligence directly into creators' hands.

confirmed_facts: JWX acquired Aug X Labs, the company behind Augie Studio
Augie Studio is being incorporated into JWX Studio
Augie will sunset its direct-to-consumer product
the product focus is publishers and media companies
JWX Studio is an AI-assisted video production and repurposing solution
the intended audience is publishers and media enterprises
the workflow retains human editorial control
the consumer product is no longer offered
existing enterprise users can continue during the transition

field_values.jetpack_seo_html_title: Augie Studio Review: AI Video Tool After JWX Acquisition
field_values.advanced_seo_description: A hands-on Augie Studio review, updated after JWX acquired Aug X Labs and sunset the consumer product. See what changed and who JWX Studio now serves.

body_insertion.needle: Hey tech rebels and digital visionaries, Kris Krug here with an exploration of brand spankin new Augie Studio. This platform is pioneering the AI-driven video creation space, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in media production.
body_insertion.note_html: Update, July 2026: JWX acquired Aug X Labs, the company behind Augie Studio, in January 2026. JWX is sunsetting Augie’s direct-to-consumer product and integrating its technology into JWX Studio for publishers and media enterprises. The hands-on review below is preserved as a snapshot of the 2024 product.
body_insertion.replacement:
Update, July 2026: JWX acquired Aug X Labs, the company behind Augie Studio, in January 2026. JWX is sunsetting Augie’s direct-to-consumer product and integrating its technology into JWX Studio for publishers and media enterprises. The hands-on review below is preserved as a snapshot of the 2024 product.

Hey tech rebels and digital visionaries, Kris Krug here with an exploration of brand spankin new Augie Studio. This platform is pioneering the AI-driven video creation space, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in media production.
